acceptance_criteria.given: the full git diff produced by this change
acceptance_criteria.then: the diff touches exactly agents/push-analyst.md, hooks/tests/test_final_sweep.sh, and commands/push.md; within agents/push-analyst.md, only the TTL assignment and immediately adjacent TTL explanatory comment are modified

check.agents_push_analyst_hunk_constraint: only TTL assignment line and immediately adjacent TTL explanatory comment lines changed

acceptance_criteria.when: the specific assertion lines are read
acceptance_criteria.then: line 64 greps for PUSH_ANALYST_GRANT_TTL_SECONDS = 600 (not 180); line 73 asserts val.value == 600 (not 180); line 86 grep pattern requires 600 (not only 180)

assertions.note: The AC4 V3 grep command at this line must contain 600 in its pattern so it verifies the new TTL value; a bare PUSH_ANALYST_GRANT_TTL_SECONDS name match without 600 is not sufficient

acceptance_criteria.given: commands/push.md Push-analyst grant TTL section (around lines 216-228) after the change
acceptance_criteria.when: the TTL documentation section is read
acceptance_criteria.then: it documents PUSH_ANALYST_GRANT_TTL_SECONDS = 600 and 600s/600 seconds as the current TTL; stale current-value prose ('PUSH_ANALYST_GRANT_TTL_SECONDS = 180' as a current value and 'The 180s TTL is the named constant') no longer appears

assertions.note: stale current-value assignment must be gone (historical mentions like 'raised from 180 to 600' are acceptable)

assertions.must_not_match: The 180s TTL is the named constant
assertions.note: stale prose identifying 180s as current value must be gone
